member.name: T:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.AutoRegistration.AssemblyTypeScanner
member.summary: Scans assemblies and returns loadable types safely.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.AutoRegistration.AssemblyTypeScanner.GetCandidateAssemblies(System.Reflection.Assembly)
member.summary: Gets candidate assemblies for auto registration.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.AutoRegistration.AssemblyTypeScanner.GetLoadableTypes(System.Reflection.Assembly)
member.summary: Gets loadable types from the specified assembly.

member.name: T:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.AutoRegistration.AutoRegistrationService
member.summary: Automatically registers Dreamine-supported types.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.AutoRegistration.AutoRegistrationService.#ctor(Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.DependencyInjection.IAssemblyTypeScanner,Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.DependencyInjection.IAutoRegistrationFilter)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.AutoRegistration.AutoRegistrationService.RegisterAll(System.Reflection.Assembly,Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.DependencyInjection.IServiceRegistry)
member.summary: Registers supported types from the specified root assembly.
member.param: The root assembly to scan first.

member.name: T:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.AutoRegistration.NamingConventionAutoRegistrationFilter
member.summary: Determines whether a type matches Dreamine auto-registration naming conventions.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.AutoRegistration.NamingConventionAutoRegistrationFilter.IsTarget(System.Type)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified type is eligible for auto registration.
member.returns: True if the type is eligible; otherwise false.

member.name: T:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DependencyInjection.ConstructorActivator
member.summary: Creates object instances by resolving constructor parameters.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DependencyInjection.ConstructorActivator.#ctor(Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.DependencyInjection.IConstructorSelector)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DependencyInjection.ConstructorActivator.CreateInstance(System.Type,Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.DependencyInjection.IServiceResolver)
member.summary: Creates an instance of the specified implementation type.
member.param: The resolver used to resolve constructor dependencies.

member.name: T:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DependencyInjection.ConstructorSelector
member.summary: Selects the constructor with the largest number of parameters.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DependencyInjection.ConstructorSelector.SelectConstructor(System.Type)
member.summary: Selects the constructor to use for the specified implementation type.

member.name: T:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DependencyInjection.DreamineContainer
member.summary: Default dependency container implementation for Dreamine.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DependencyInjection.DreamineContainer.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DependencyInjection.DreamineContainer.#ctor(Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.DependencyInjection.IObjectActivator)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DependencyInjection.DreamineContainer.Register``1
member.summary: Registers a concrete implementation type as itself.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DependencyInjection.DreamineContainer.Register``2
member.summary: Registers a service abstraction with a concrete implementation.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DependencyInjection.DreamineContainer.Register``1(System.Func{``0})
member.summary: Registers a factory for the specified service type.
member.param: The factory used to create the service instance.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DependencyInjection.DreamineContainer.RegisterSingleton``1(``0)
member.summary: Registers a singleton instance for the specified service type.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DependencyInjection.DreamineContainer.RegisterSingleton``1
member.summary: Registers a concrete implementation type as itself with singleton lifetime.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DependencyInjection.DreamineContainer.RegisterSingleton``2
member.summary: Registers a service abstraction with a concrete implementation using singleton lifetime.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DependencyInjection.DreamineContainer.IsRegistered(System.Type)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified service type is registered.
member.returns: True if the service type is registered; otherwise false.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DependencyInjection.DreamineContainer.Resolve``1
member.summary: Resolves an instance of the specified service type.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DependencyInjection.DreamineContainer.TryResolve``1(``0@)
member.summary: Attempts to resolve an instance of the specified service type without throwing.
member.param: The resolved instance, or null if not registered.
member.returns: true if resolved successfully; otherwise false.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DependencyInjection.DreamineContainer.Resolve(System.Type)
member.summary: Resolves an instance of the specified service type.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DependencyInjection.DreamineContainer.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes all singleton instances that implement , then clears all registrations.

member.name: T:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DependencyInjection.ResolutionContext
member.summary: Tracks a single Resolve call graph so circular dependency detection is isolated per thread/async flow.

member.name: T:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DependencyInjection.ServiceDescriptor
member.summary: Describes a registered service.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DependencyInjection.ServiceDescriptor.#ctor(System.Type,System.Type,System.Func{System.Object},System.Object,Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DependencyInjection.ServiceLifetime)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DependencyInjection.ServiceDescriptor.ServiceType
member.summary: Gets the service abstraction type.

member.name: P:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DependencyInjection.ServiceDescriptor.ImplementationType
member.summary: Gets the concrete implementation type.

member.name: P:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DependencyInjection.ServiceDescriptor.Factory
member.summary: Gets the factory used to create the service instance.

member.name: P:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DependencyInjection.ServiceDescriptor.Instance
member.summary: Gets the registered singleton instance.

member.name: P:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DependencyInjection.ServiceDescriptor.Lifetime
member.summary: Gets the service lifetime.

member.name: T:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DependencyInjection.ServiceLifetime
member.summary: Represents the lifetime of a registered service.

member.name: F:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DependencyInjection.ServiceLifetime.Transient
member.summary: A new instance is created every time the service is resolved.

member.name: F:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DependencyInjection.ServiceLifetime.Singleton
member.summary: A single instance is reused for the lifetime of the container.

member.name: T:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DMContainer
member.summary: Provides a static facade for the default Dreamine dependency container.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DMContainer.GetRegistry
member.summary: Returns the underlying so that external utilities (e.g. ) can register types without going through the static facade methods.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DMContainer.GetResolver
member.summary: Returns the underlying for constructor injection scenarios where callers want to avoid a direct static dependency on .

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DMContainer.SetContainer(Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.DependencyInjection.IServiceContainer)
member.summary: Replaces the default container used by the static facade.
member.param: The container to use for subsequent registrations and resolutions.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DMContainer.Reset
member.summary: Resets the static facade to a new empty instance.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DMContainer.Register``1
member.summary: Registers a concrete implementation type as itself with transient lifetime.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DMContainer.Register``2
member.summary: Registers a service abstraction with a concrete implementation using transient lifetime.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DMContainer.Register``1(System.Func{``0})
member.summary: Registers a factory for the specified service type using transient lifetime.
member.param: The factory used to create the service instance.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DMContainer.RegisterSingleton``1(``0)
member.summary: Registers a singleton instance for the specified service type.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DMContainer.RegisterSingleton``1
member.summary: Registers a concrete implementation type as itself with singleton lifetime.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DMContainer.RegisterSingleton``2
member.summary: Registers a service abstraction with a concrete implementation using singleton lifetime.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DMContainer.Resolve``1
member.summary: Resolves an instance of the specified service type.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DMContainer.Resolve(System.Type)
member.summary: Resolves an instance of the specified service type.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DMContainer.TryResolve``1(``0@)
member.summary: Attempts to resolve an instance of the specified service type without throwing.
member.param: The resolved instance, or null if not registered.
member.returns: true if resolved successfully; otherwise false.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DMContainer.AutoRegisterAll(System.Reflection.Assembly)
member.summary: Automatically registers supported types from the specified root assembly using singleton lifetime.
member.param: The root assembly to scan first.
member.remarks: Prefer for new code. This overload is kept for backward compatibility.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DMContainer.IsRegistered``1
member.summary: Determines whether the specified service type is registered.
member.returns: True if the service type is registered; otherwise false.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DMContainer.IsRegistered(System.Type)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified service type is registered.
member.returns: True if the service type is registered; otherwise false.

member.name: T:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DreamineAutoRegistrar
member.summary: Scans assemblies and registers matching types into a service registry. Separated from to keep the DI facade focused on registration and resolution, not type scanning.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DreamineAutoRegistrar.RegisterAll(System.Reflection.Assembly,Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.DependencyInjection.IServiceRegistry)
member.summary: Scans and all transitively referenced Dreamine assemblies for types that match the naming convention, then registers them into with singleton lifetime.
member.param: The registry to register discovered types into.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.DreamineAutoRegistrar.RegisterAll(System.Reflection.Assembly)
member.summary: Scans and registers matching types into the global singleton.

member.name: T:Dreamine.MVVM.Core.Locators.DreamineContainerViewModelResolver
member.summary: Resolves ViewModel instances through the Dreamine dependency container.
